Best Pest Control NYC provides expert wasp removal services throughout East Harlem, from pre-war walk-ups to newer high-rise buildings. Our certified technicians safely eliminate wasp nests and prevent future colonies from establishing around your property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served East Harlem for years, understanding the unique pest challenges of this vibrant Manhattan neighborhood. Our licensed experts use safe, effective methods tailored to the area's diverse housing stock, offering competitive pricing ($350-$550) and same-day emergency service when you need it most.
localContext: East Harlem's mix of classic brownstones, NYCHA developments, and modern apartments along the East River creates numerous opportunities for wasps to nest in eaves, fire escapes, and rooftop areas. From the bustling blocks around La Marqueta to the residential streets near Marcus Garvey Park, our team knows the neighborhood and responds quickly to protect residents and local businesses.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in East Harlem?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day wasp removal service throughout East Harlem. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours of arrival, depending on nest size and location. Emergency services are available for severe infestations.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 wasp removal service?
faqs.answer: Our wasp removal service includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area, wasp elimination, and preventative measures to discourage future nests. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and the severity of the infestation.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for families and pets in East Harlem apartments?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and proven techniques that are safe for children and pets. Our technicians take extra precautions in multi-family buildings to ensure neighboring units are not affected, and we provide clear instructions for re-entry after treatment.

faqs.question: When is wasp season in East Harlem, and when should I call?
faqs.answer: Wasp activity in East Harlem typically peaks from late spring through early fall (May-October). Call us immediately if you notice wasp activity or nests forming, as early intervention is easier and more affordable. We also provide preventative treatments in early spring to stop nests before they start.
